caption: A person is seen using a paper trimmer on a white gridded cutting mat to prepare craft materials. They are wearing white nail polish and are working with patterned paper, including a blue textured sheet and a dark green floral pattern. The person uses the trimmer's guide and blade to cut the floral paper into narrow strips. In the bottom frames, the person's hands move to pick up and adjust the cut strips of floral paper. A logo reading "Stamping Jill" is visible in the bottom left of the frames, and a small tag with the phrase "best things" appears in the upper left of some frames. The sequence shows a continuous process of measuring, cutting, and handling the patterned paper strips atop the workstation.
